title: Great a friendship
content:
Great a friendship
Terrible at intimacy

Can I finally build the wall I've always yearned for between myself and myself? The wall that blocked all primal advances--maybe not blocked ALL primal advances, but at least had a screening gatehouse to check for the proper paperwork, to ask such important questions: business or pleasure? pleasure or pain? pain or gain? gain or same? ........ I made a run for it and I was almost free. Almost. Besides the wanton weekend lovers and the Saturday Sunday distractions, I made strides of strength and depth towards weekday work and focus. My, how I have fallen face first back into those same wretched wrathful habits that keep my feet cemented squarely to the ground, divided, conquered. Can a line be tethered instead of a wall? Is it all or nothing? Where is the control I work(ed) so hard for? There is definitions undefined and intentions floating free, rising and raising towards insecurity.

Maybe I'm just too hard on myself?

What do I want more than anything?
To be respected and successful
To be thin and fit
To be comfortable in my own skin
context: From document: Great a friendship — chunk 1 (chunk 1/2)
